body.u: As I look back on my past. Really I think I have had quite a good life. In the beginning, when I left school at the age of sixteen, I remember this year quite well, because it was the year in which I had to do my exams, which were C.S.E.s Also I got the grades of 1’s to 3’s. When I left school I went straight into an electricanselectrician's job as an apprentice electrician for five years. After I finished my apprentispapprenticeship as an electrician. I got a job as an electronic engineer on televisions, because the money was quite good. This was when I was about twenty years old. When I was about 29-30 I got married, to a girl who was a secretary for a big company on the island. Then we had a child about two or three years later. It was a boy. About ten years later, when I am about forty odd I am made chief technician, of the components which is now a big electronic firm. When I was about 45 years old I start my own company up on electrics. For wiring up houses (new). After the first couple of years I do this on my own, but then I dicidedecided to take on an apprentice, so I got my son to work with me. Then or now I have retired, my son is still working for me but really he runs it, so really the company is his now. But I have had a good life.
